name: XinJiang Beiken Energy Engineering Co,.Ltd
summary: Xinjiang Beiken Energy Engineering Co., Ltd. provides oil, gas, and coal bed methane extraction; and related engineering and technical services in China and internationally. The company offers drilling and cementing engineering, and directional well technical services, as well as mud, downhole, and oil production technical services; and oil and gas field exploration and development technology research and consulting services. It is also involved in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of drilling, cementing, and oil production additives used in oilfields; manufacture of logging while drilling tools and PDC drill bit; testing and maintenance/repair of well control equipment; and lease and repair of drilling and other tools. In addition, the company imports/exports petroleum machinery and electromechanical products; invests in the oil sector; and provides after-sale and professional technical consultancy services. The company was formerly known as XinJiang Beiken Energy Engineering Stock Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Xinjiang Beiken Energy Engineering Co., Ltd. in November 2017. Xinjiang Beiken Energy Engineering Co., Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Karamay, China.
